_comment: Clean fixture: every release repo pins the gated ref; one repo has no release.yml (null, skipped); one publishes elsewhere (no reusable call, skipped). The gate exits 0.
cinatra-ai/example-connector:
name: release
on:
  push:
    tags: ['v*']
jobs:
  release:
    uses: cinatra-ai/.github/.github/workflows/reusable-extension-release.yml@1e4448a75dc27b7be4d52ac3ce0734fa7c766957 # v0.1.1
    secrets: inherit
cinatra-ai/example-agent:
name: release
on:
  push:
    tags: ['v*']
jobs:
  release:
    uses: cinatra-ai/.github/.github/workflows/reusable-extension-release.yml@1e4448a75dc27b7be4d52ac3ce0734fa7c766957 # v0.1.1
    secrets: inherit
cinatra-ai/example-cli:
name: release
on:
  push:
    tags: ['v*']
jobs:
  release:
    steps:
      - run: npm publish --access public
